faq.a: Aspiring makers. If that's you and "stuck, never ship" sounds familiar, this was built for your exact situation.

faq.q: Why would I pay for this?
How fast do I get it?

validationMetric: 150+ visits; target 30+ waitlist emails or 3 pre-orders in 14 days
deploymentTarget: Vercel (static) — primary; Cloudflare Pages / Netlify alternates
killCriteria: <10 waitlist emails AND 0 pre-orders after 150 visits
biggestRisk: Waitlist signups != revenue; intent can be soft; you still have to build it
first10: Post the promise in 3 niche communities; 10 warm DMs; 1 Product Hunt 'coming soon'
